databases.usage: Dual-purpose snapshot store (snapshots table with latest + per-cycle history) and event store (events table for append-only orchestration log); created by build_local_workspace_persistence()
Key/value memory store for persisted planning context (concept briefs, specialized knowledge, acceptance goals) organized by namespace/key as individual JSON files

storage.usage: Text artifact store for executor output artifacts, runtime context snapshots (specialized_knowledge.json, concept_decision.json, node_knowledge_packet.json, concept_brief.md, acceptance_goals.json) written per-project and per-cycle
Primary mutable workspace snapshot: the single source of truth for all initiative, project, work package, seam, and executor policy state; read and written by devforge snapshot command
Per-project configuration overlay: llm_preferences, knowledge_preferences, pull_policy_overrides applied to snapshot before each cycle
Lightweight alternative append-only event log (JSONL format) used when SQLite persistence is not configured

external_apis.name: OpenRouter
external_apis.usage: LLM routing over chat-completions API for all planning decisions (concept collection, workset planning, retry routing, design generation)

external_apis.name: Google AI (Gemini)
external_apis.usage: Gemini LLM via generateContent API; default live provider in default_live_llm_preferences() with gemini-3.1-pro-preview

external_apis.name: Brave Search
external_apis.usage: Web search for market research and competitive analysis during tool-enhanced concept collection nodes

external_apis.name: FAL (fal.ai)
external_apis.usage: Flux/SDXL image generation for UI mockups and design artifacts in product design and acceptance stages

external_apis.name: Google Stitch UI
external_apis.auth: OAuth or API key (MCP or HTTP mode)
external_apis.usage: AI-driven UI prototype generation; used in product design (concept mockups) and acceptance (visual reference) stages

subprocess_executors.name: python_local
subprocess_executors.notes: Deterministic fallback when live AI executors are unavailable; handles acceptance report generation locally

http_transport.usage: All outbound LLM provider API calls (OpenRouter, Google GenAI); injected via HTTPTransport Protocol allowing StubHTTPTransport substitution in tests

config_files.usage: Runtime LLM provider selection: provider (openrouter|google), model name, allow_live flag; loaded by load_llm_config() searching upward from project root
Per-project runtime preferences overlay written by devforge init and read by devforge snapshot
Package manifest: Python >=3.12 constraint, langgraph and httpx dependencies, devforge CLI entry point

test_infrastructure.mock_strategy: MockLLMClient returns deterministic structured responses; StubHTTPTransport replaces httpx; fixture JSON snapshots for e2e cycles
test_infrastructure.notes: All 256 tests pass without network access using stub/mock injection; live tests are optional and marked separately
